[[af:Aardtier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-ìng]][[de:Erde-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de terre]][[hak:Vú-yìm]][[ja:戊寅]][[ko:무인 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Tiger]][[vi:Mậu Dần]][[za:Fouhyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-în]][[zh-yue:戊寅]][[zh:戊寅]]

'''Yang Earth Tiger also known as 戊寅''' (tsuchinoetora, bodonotora, boin) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 15th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Fire Ox]] and followed by [[Yin Earth Rabbit]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]] represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Tiger (zodiac)|Tiger (寅)]] represents yang [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Restraint]]) (Wood overcomes Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Tiger (戊寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 jan4
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muin (무인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Dần

==Years of Yang Earth Tiger==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 18 when divided by 60 is a year of Bointora ([[Year|year]]).
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Bointora (戊寅の年)'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 18|18 AD]]
* [[AD 78|78 AD]]
* [[AD 138|138 AD]]
* [[198|198 AD]]
* [[258|258 AD]]
* [[318|318 AD]]
* [[378|378 AD]]
* [[438|438 AD]]
* [[498|498 AD]]
* [[558|558 AD]]
* [[618|618 AD]]
* [[678|678 AD]]
* [[738|738 AD]]
* [[798|798 AD]]
* [[858|858 AD]]
* [[918|918 AD]]
* [[978|978 AD]]
|
* [[1038|1038 AD]]
* [[1098|1098 AD]]
* [[1158|1158 AD]]
* [[1218|1218 AD]]
* [[1278|1278 AD]]
* [[1338|1338 AD]]
* [[1398|1398 AD]]
* [[1458|1458 AD]]
* [[1518|1518 AD]]
* [[1578|1578 AD]]
* [[1638|1638 AD]]
* [[1698|1698 AD]]
* [[1758|1758 AD]]
* [[1818|1818 AD]]
* [[1878|1878 AD]]
* [[1938|1938 AD]]
* [[1998|1998 AD]]
|
* [[2058 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2118 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2178 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2238 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2298 AD]]
* [[2358 AD]]
* [[25th century|2418 AD]]
* [[2478 AD]]
* [[2538 AD]]
* [[2598 AD]]
* [[2658 AD]]
* [[2718 AD]]
* [[2778 AD]]
* [[2838 AD]]
* [[2898 AD]]
* [[2958 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the month of [[January]] is designated as the Bointora [[Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the seasonal month (from [[Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Tiger==
The [[Senjitsu]] for Bointora is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bointora day is the 1st day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Small Earth]].
==See Also==
{{wikidata link|Q1061986}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
